title: Retenzy.pdf
summaries:
* Retenzy is an all-in-one customer retention and loyalty platform designed for growing e-commerce brands on Shopify.
* Founded in 2023 and headquartered in Pune, India, the software combines rewards, referral structures, and product reviews to increase customer lifetime value (LTV).
* It features comprehensive loyalty programs that support points-based economies, tier-based VIP tracks, and custom milestones.
* Integrated review management automates the collection of text, photo, and video reviews through scheduled emails or SMS.
* The platform automatically syncs verified reviews with Google Shopping and generates SEO-rich snippets.
* It includes referral and membership incentives to build custom referral networks.

* Integrates with Google Shopping and generates SEO-rich snippets.  
* Enables businesses to create custom referral networks and membership tiers with exclusive perks.  
* Provides built-in email marketing flows, including welcome emails, shipping updates, abandoned cart reminders, and post-purchase follow-ups.  
* Retenzy features over 15 pre-built storefront widgets to display loyalty incentives and review sections without custom development.
